(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: height 1 (b1 on table)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: height 1 (b2 on table)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: height 1 (b3 on table)
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4: height 2 (b4 on table, b5 on b4)
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 5: height 12 (b6 on table, b7 on b6, ..., b17 on top)
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (clear b17)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top
      (clear b1)
      (on-table b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top
      (clear b2)
      (on-table b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top
      (clear b3)
      (on-table b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b5 on table, b4 on top of b5
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b17 on table, b16 on b17, ..., b6 on top
      (on-table b17)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: height 1 (b1 on table)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: height 1 (b2 on table)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: height 1 (b3 on table)
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4: height 2 (b4 on table, b5 on b4)
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 5: height 12 (b6 on table, b7 on b6, ..., b17 on top)
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (clear b17)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top
      (clear b1)
      (on-table b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top
      (clear b2)
      (on-table b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top
      (clear b3)
      (on-table b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b5 on table, b4 on top of b5
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b17 on table, b16 on b17, ..., b6 on top
      (on-table b17)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
    )
  )
)
